title.name: Professional and Occupational Licensing, Certification, Title Protection and Registration. Examining Boards

sections.heading: Secs. 20-341s to 20-341bb. Definitions. Certificate of registration required. Application for certificate of registration; fee. Powers of commissioner; issuance of certificate of registration; suspension, revocation, refusal to renew. Refusal to issue or renew a certificate of registration; notice and hearing. Investigations; subpoenas; court orders and injunctions. Display of certificate of registration; prohibited acts; unfair trade practice; duration of certificate; renewal fees; fines. Exemptions. Regulations. Appeals.

body: Sections 20-341s to 20-341bb, inclusive, are repealed, effective October 1, 2025.
content.plainText: Sections 20-341s to 20-341bb, inclusive, are repealed, effective October 1, 2025.
